info.description: Web services to manage Product Category objects from 3DPortfolio service.
info.title: 3DPortfolio Web Services

post.description: Create Portfolio with its first Version

get.description: Get all the portfolios accessible to the user

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of portfolio versions to skip. Default value is 0.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of portfolio versions to fetch. Default is 50 and max is 1000.

patch.description: Update the attributes values of a Portfolio Version

schema.description: The entity tag value that should be matched for a successful update.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the portfolio version.

patch.description: Add or remove an item in the portfolio. Portfolio items are restricted to Portfolio Versions and Models.

schema.description: The entity tag value that should be matched for a successful update.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the item accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the item accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the portfolio version.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the item accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item.

patch.summary: Add or Remove effective sellable items to a Product Category
patch.description: Set and unset effective sellable items to a Product Category. Sellable Items passed in payload here should be of a model present in the current Product Category; otherwise, the API execution will fail.

schema.description: The entity tag value that should be matched for a successful update.

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

200.description: Effective sellable items added and removed

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The model of Sellable Item  uuid:8636c658-cf96-4b29-ab0a-65095b9668f2, is not part of the Product Category uuid:8636c658-cf96-4b29-ab0a-65095b9668a1.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the product category.

get.summary: Get effective sellable items of a Product Category
get.description: Get effective sellable items of a Product Category

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the document accessible in the federated search.

post.description: Set Governing Project for a Portfolio Version. If a governing project is already set, it will be replaced.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the project.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Project.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the portfolio version.

post.description: Remove Governing Project for a Portfolio Version

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the portfolio version.

get.description: Get Governing Project of the Portfolio Version

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Project.

type.description: Should be dsxpfl:PortfolioVersion if the portfolio is not of custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the portfolio version.

description.example: Portfolio of autonomous cars of the company.

state.description: The maturity state of the portfolio.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the person.

description.example: Portfolio of autonomous cars of the company.

image.description: A Base64 encoded image. The maximum allowed size of the image is 100kb.

description.example: Portfolio of autonomous cars of the company.

image.description: A Base64 encoded image. The maximum allowed size of the image is 100kb.

xmlHttpRequestHeader.name: X-Requested-With
xmlHttpRequestHeader.description: Required header. The value is XMLHttpRequest.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Portfolio version uri is missing in you request.

message.example: Operation cannot be done as the Portfolio is not in Private/In work State.
